ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the forum */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the profile belongs to */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website or blog URL of the user */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "private_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each private message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text content of the message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the message has been read */,
  "deleted_by_sender" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the message has been deleted by the sender */,
  "deleted_by_receiver" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the message has been deleted by the receiver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_private_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_private_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the category is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the topic belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the topic */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "post_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts in the topic */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the topic is locked */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the topic is sticky */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the post has been deleted */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been edited */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last edited */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the post has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the reply belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the reply has been deleted */,
  "edit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply has been edited */,
  "last_edit_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last edited */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the reply has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like belongs to */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply the like belongs to (NULL if post) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the like */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the like has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the view belongs to */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the view belongs to (NULL if topic) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the topic or post */,
  "viewed_date" TEXT /* Date the topic or post was viewed */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the view record has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the mention belongs to */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply the mention belongs to (NULL if post) */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mention was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the mention has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the notification has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or TEXT field to store the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role is the primary role for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
